title: linum rigidum var. carteri
intro: Linum rigidum var. carteri, also known as California flax or golden flax, is a plant species within the Linum genus that is native to the southwestern United States and Baja California. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Linum rigidum var. carteri include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
